description: Build a custom music preview player with full playback controls including play/pause, progress bar, time display, volume control, and single-track-at-a-time enforcement. Enhance the AudioPlayerContext to expose progress/volume state and the AudioPlayer component to render the rich UI.
steps: Refactor app/components/AudioPlayerContext.tsx to expose additional state: currentTime, duration, volume, progress percentage, and methods setVolume, seekTo. Add timeupdate and loadedmetadata event listeners on the Audio element. Ensure cleanup of event listeners. Keep the existing play/pause/currentlyPlayingId API intact for backward compatibility. Also expose the currently playing track name and preview URL so the player UI can display them.

Rewrite app/components/AudioPlayer.tsx as a rich custom player with: (1) Play/Pause button with clear icon states, (2) A progress bar that updates in real-time showing elapsed playback - use an <input type='range'> or a clickable div for seeking, (3) Current playback time displayed as mm:ss, (4) Remaining duration displayed as -mm:ss, (5) Volume control slider with mute/unmute icon. Use responsive Tailwind CSS utility classes. Use semantic HTML (e.g., <figure> or <div role='group'> with aria-labels for the player controls). Ensure the player looks good on mobile (stack controls vertically or wrap) and desktop (single row).
Ensure that when a new song preview is played (via play()), the previous one stops automatically - this is already handled in the context but verify it still works with the new state management.

Add route-change cleanup: use Next.js App Router patterns (useEffect cleanup or listening to pathname changes via next/navigation's usePathname) in the AudioPlayerContext or a wrapper so audio stops when the user navigates away from the page.
Verify the player still works on the track detail page (app/track/[id]/page.tsx) where AudioPlayer is used. The component API (previewUrl, trackId, trackName props) should remain the same.
acceptance_criteria: Only one song preview can play at a time - starting a new preview stops the previous one
Progress bar updates in real time during playback
Current time and remaining duration are displayed and update during playback
Audio stops when navigating away from the page (route change)
The player is responsive and uses semantic HTML with proper aria labels
The project builds successfully with 'bunx next build'
verification: Run 'bunx next build' and confirm successful TypeScript compilation and build with no errors
Run 'bunx next lint' and confirm no lint errors
